message.content:
Explore the collabspace-web frontend project at D:\project\pt-gitlab\collabspace\collabspace-web to understand:

1. Find existing announcement/notice/公告/banner related components. Search for: announcement, notice, 公告, banner, bulletin, notification
2. Find the space management admin pages - how is the admin panel structured
3. Find the rich text editor components already in use (what library/approach)
4. Find the modal/dialog component pattern used in the project
5. Find the i18n structure - where are translation files, how are keys organized
6. Find the API call pattern - how are backend APIs called (axios/fetch wrapper, hooks)
7. Find the document list page - where the banner would be displayed
8. Find the existing cloud drive banner/notice component that needs to be replaced
9. Check the routing structure for admin pages

Be thorough in your search.
